why: CHART: 4x rejection at 7528 (09:35/10:00/10:10/10:11), now lost VWAP-proxy 7521 on two consecutive red candles (10:10, 10:15) with negative and worsening momentum (5m -0.08%, 15m -0.13%) = exhaustion top rollover. GEX CONFIRM: no support until 7505 King barney / 7495 pika floor below (~13-23pt air), no node overhead until far-off 7540, positive-gamma means the 7528 top holds as resistance backing the fade. Target the 7505/7495 support cluster; bail on VWAP reclaim >7524.

Cover short into the 7505 King barney (-10M) opposing support node. Move from 7528 exhaustion top to 7510 (~5.5pt gain from 7518.30 entry) with momentum decelerating (5m -0.07% vs -0.16%) and price grinding not flushing (lows 7512.5->7510.1, closing back up). Cap the 0DTE winner into support before a chop-regime bounce to VWAP 7520 erodes it.

CHART: decisive breakdown to new LOD 7495 — broke the 7500 day-open and prior 7495 support on accelerating downside momentum (15m -0.35%), below VWAP 7518 all session, 10:25/10:30 candles printing lower. GEX CONFIRM (strong): deepest negative gamma of the day (-23M) = levels break/moves extend; the 7495 pika floor just EVAPORATED, nearest support now 7425 = ~70pt air pocket below; 7500 barney flipped to overhead resistance. Flush-through-support short. Target the air pocket toward 7470/7460 and trail; bail on reclaim >7502.

Cover breakdown short. Flush exhausted at 7480.4 and bouncing to 7484.8 with momentum decelerating (5m from -0.23 to -0.14). Banking gain from 7495.25 entry after giving back from the peak. Air-pocket target 7425 not reached but the leg is spent; violent neg-gamma tape snaps back toward the 7500 barney and VWAP 7515, so cap the winner.

CHART: failed bounce / lower-high. Grind up stalled at 7490.7 (11:45), rejected and closed on its low 7484, below VWAP 7495 — a lower high in the days downtrend (open 7500 to LOD 7463). 5m momentum turned negative. GEX CONFIRM: very strong 7500 King barney (-21M) caps upside and in positive gamma levels hold, so the bounce fails; downside target the range toward the strengthening 7450 pika floor (+11.5M). Positive-gamma dampening means modest target: cover into 7465 range-low. Bail on reclaim >7491.

Cover the failed-bounce short. Down-move stalled fast at 7474 and bounced to 7477 — positive-gamma dampening (+16M) capping it as expected. Banking ~7pt gain from 7484.01. Holding for the 7450 floor is poor R/R now (only ~5pt more to target vs ~7pt round-trip risk back to entry/VWAP 7495 if it mean-reverts in this pin). Cap the 0DTE winner.
